app_info.subtitle: Shared AI memory
app_info.description: Kumbukum gives ChatGPT access to a user's authenticated memory workspace. Users can search and retrieve notes, memories, saved URLs, emails, projects, graph links, and git-sync context, then create new private notes, memories, saved URLs, email records, and graph links when requested.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private note in the user's Kumbukum workspace, so it changes workspace state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Kumbukum workspace and does not publish content to public internet systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a new note and does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a selected note by ID without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads from the user's private Kumbukum workspace and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists notes from the user's workspace without creating or updating records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace data and does not write to public internet systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored notes and returns matching results without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores a new private memory in the user's Kumbukum workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Kumbukum workspace and does not publish content publicly.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a new memory and does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored memories and returns matching results without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored memories and returns matching results without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a selected memory by ID without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves suggested tags from existing workspace metadata without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum tag data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored notes, memories, URLs, emails, and crawled pages without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a saved URL record in the user's Kumbukum workspace and may fetch page content.
justifications.open_world_justification: May contact external URLs to retrieve page content before saving it privately.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a saved URL record and does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists saved URLs from the user's workspace without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches saved URLs and crawled content without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a selected saved URL record without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores a provided email payload in the user's private Kumbukum workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to Kumbukum and does not send email or publish content externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates an email record and does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a selected stored email by ID without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum email data and does not send messages or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send messages, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists stored emails from the user's workspace without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum email data and does not send messages or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send messages, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored email records without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum email data and does not send messages or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send messages, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves stored emails related to a selected message thread without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum email data and does not send messages or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send messages, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists available Kumbukum projects without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace metadata and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves metadata for a selected project without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace metadata and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves per-project document counts without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace metadata and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private graph link between existing Kumbukum items.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Kumbukum graph and does not publish content publicly.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a link and does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves graph links for an item without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum graph data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the user's knowledge graph without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum graph data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves direct graph connections for an item without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum graph data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists configured git-sync repositories without modifying configuration or repository contents.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads Kumbukum git-sync configuration and does not contact or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, push code, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Adds a git-sync configuration and may import markdown content into the user's Kumbukum workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: May contact an external git repository to import content into Kumbukum.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds sync configuration and imports content but does not remove repositories or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves sync status for a configured git repository without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads Kumbukum sync status and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, push code, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Search across the review demo workspace.
test_cases.user_prompt: Search my Kumbukum knowledge for OpenAI review demo.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns relevant demo notes, memories, URLs, or emails with concise excerpts and identifiers for follow-up reads.

test_cases.description: Retrieve a specific note after search.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open the product launch note from the OpenAI review demo results.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds and reads the matching note, then summarizes its launch checklist and related context.

test_cases.user_prompt: What reviewer preference memories do I have for the OpenAI app submission?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching memory records such as reviewer preferences and summarizes the relevant guidance.

test_cases.description: Use the email layer in the public app profile.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find the demo review checklist email and summarize the requested checks.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds the stored demo email and summarizes the checklist without exposing unnecessary internal metadata.

test_cases.description: Save a URL into Kumbukum for later retrieval.
test_cases.user_prompt: Save https://developers.openai.com/apps-sdk/app-submission-guidelines to Kumbukum with the title OpenAI app submission guidelines.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a saved URL record in the user's workspace and confirms the saved title or URL.

test_cases.description: Create persistent memory from a user instruction.
test_cases.user_prompt: Remember that OpenAI app review answers should be concise and source-backed.
test_cases.expected_output: Stores a new memory in the user's workspace and confirms what was remembered.

test_cases.description: Create a project note from conversation context.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a note titled OpenAI review follow-up with a short checklist for testing OAuth, email search, and graph links.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a private note with the requested title and checklist content.

test_cases.description: Inspect graph relationships for a known item.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show the graph links related to the OpenAI App Review Demo launch note.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds the relevant note and returns its connected memories, URLs, or emails where links exist.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke Kumbukum for unrelated calendar scheduling.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a meeting with Nitai tomorrow at 3 PM.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because Kumbukum does not manage calendars or schedule meetings.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke Kumbukum to send external email.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send an email to the OpenAI reviewer with our demo account credentials.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked to send email because Kumbukum stores/searches email records but does not send outbound email.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke Kumbukum for destructive deletion in the app profile.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete all memories and notes from my Kumbukum account.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not perform this request because destructive delete tools are not exposed in the app profile.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke Kumbukum for subscription checkout.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Upgrade my Kumbukum account to a paid subscription.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the ChatGPT app does not facilitate purchases, checkout, or subscription upgrades.
